log_level.markdownDescription: Define the minimum log level used for logging output on the console.

settings.auto_complete.markdownDescription: Auto complete keys and values in Sublime Settings.

settings.exclude_color_scheme_patterns.markdownDescription: List of patterns for color schemes not to be displayed in completions. Each color scheme containing one of the list's strings is hidden.

settings.exclude_syntax_patterns.markdownDescription: List of patterns for syntax definitions that will not be offered in completions. The syntaxes resource paths are fnmatch'ed (`*` matches everything, including slashes) against these patterns.

settings.exclude_theme_patterns.markdownDescription: List of patterns for themes not to be displayed in completions. Each theme containing one of the list's strings is hidden.

settings.highlight_scope.markdownDescription: Scope for highlighting unknown settings keys.

settings.highlight_styles.markdownDescription: What add_region styles to use for highlighting of unknown settings keys.

settings.linting.markdownDescription: Underline unknown keys in Sublime Settings.

settings.show_quick_edit_icon.markdownDescription: Whether to show the edit settings pencil icon. Close & reopen the settings file for this to take effect.

settings.tooltip.markdownDescription: Show tooltip with setting description on hovering keys and values.

syntax.captures_highlight_scope.markdownDescription: Scope for highlighting capture group for the current scope line.

syntax.captures_highlight_styles.markdownDescription: What add_region styles to use for highlighting of the capture group.

syntax_test.highlight_scope.markdownDescription: Scope for highlighting the line/positions being tested.

syntax_test.highlight_styles.markdownDescription: What add_region styles to use for highlighting of the line/positions being tested.

syntax_test.skip_whitespace.markdownDescription: Whether to skip whitespace after the previous line's test assertions when pressing the Tab key on a new syntax test line

syntax_test.suggest_scope_suffix.markdownDescription: Whether or not to keep the scope suffix in the suggested test scopes i.e. if the base scope is text.html.markdown then suggest meta.example.markdown (true) vs meta.example (false).

syntax_test.suggest_asserted_prefix.markdownDescription: Whether to trim leading scopes from suggestions that are already part of previous assertions.

packagedev.syntax.input_helpers.markdownDescription:
Enable input helpers for syntax definitions.

Input helpers automatically insert whitespace after a `-` or `:`.
